positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a starry night forest. The central subject is a group of glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna, such as glowing mushrooms, delicate crystalline butterflies, and gentle, stylized fox silhouettes, all gathered beneath the expansive canopy of stylized, deep indigo and emerald trees. Use a high-contrast, silhouette-heavy vector art style combined with ethereal watercolor splashes. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, suitable for a repeating apparel print. Strong backlighting effect emanating from the bioluminescent elements, giving the scene depth and magic. Palette focuses on deep blues, vibrant emerald greens, and pops of golden yellow light. Clean lines, high detail, minimalist yet magical.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, watermarks, text, logos, trademarks, bad anatomy, noisy, out of frame, excessive clutter, photo realism, grainy, bokeh, people, figures
